message:
refactor(db): remove skip_startup_init from DbPoolConfig, add create_pool_without_startup_init

The skip_startup_init field on DbPoolConfig was a boolean flag that leaked
implementation concerns into the config struct — callers had to know about
internal pool lifecycle to set it correctly.

Replaced with a cleaner API separation:
- Remove skip_startup_init from DbPoolConfig and Default impl
- Add from_shared_pool_with_options(config, pool, skip_startup_init) as the
  internal constructor that accepts the flag
- from_shared_pool delegates with skip_startup_init=false (the default)
- Add create_pool_without_startup_init() public constructor for read-only
  helper pools that open an already-initialized mailbox under a live server

CLI: update open_db_sync_async_canonical_read_best_effort_with_database_url
to use create_pool_without_startup_init instead of setting the removed field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
